kernel_subject: netdev: reshuffle netif_napi_add() APIs to allow dropping weight
stage1_reason: Direct replacement of netif_napi_add() with netif_napi_add_weight() due to kernel API evolution where netif_napi_add() will change default weight parameter
stage2_reason: Kernel commit reshuffles netif_napi_add() APIs to allow dropping weight parameter, directly motivating driver's switch to netif_napi_add_weight() as indicated in stage-1 reason.
